title: Use of Let
description: Learn to use 'Let' — to give permission, make suggestions, and express willingness. Master let me, let him/her, let us/let's, and let in permission contexts. Very common in spoken English.

subtopics.title: Let Me
subtopics.description: Let me try. Let me explain. Let me help you. Using let me for personal requests.

subtopics.title: Let Him / Let Her / Let Them
subtopics.description: Let him speak. Let her go. Let them play. Third person with let.

subtopics.title: Let Us / Let's
subtopics.description: Let us begin. Let's eat. Let's go! Inclusive suggestions with let's.

subtopics.title: Let in Permission
subtopics.description: Please let me go. Will you let me try? Let as permission.

subtopics.title: Let in Various Sentences
subtopics.description: Mixed practice with all forms of let in real contexts.

learningObjectives: Use let me to offer help or make a personal request
Use let him/her/them to give permission
Use let us / let's for inclusive suggestions
Form negative sentences with don't let
Use let naturally in daily conversations
